title: A Dangerous Celebration
description: On pages 9–12, a dangerous celebration as after facing the Grand Line’s bizarre weather, the crew reaches Whiskey Peak and is greeted with suspicious enthusiasm.
scene: A Dangerous Celebration. After facing the Grand Line’s bizarre weather, the crew reaches Whiskey Peak and is greeted with suspicious enthusiasm. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm... there's something sinister about your faces...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What did you say your names were again...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And I'm Miss Wednesday...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Right... something about those names have been bugging me ever since I heard'em...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I feel like I've heard it before... or not...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, in any case-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Did you have a MICE nap!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You wouldn't wake up no matter how hard we tried...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Don't let your guards down, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You can never expect what might happen out here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I finally under- stand just how terrifying this ocean truly is,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: as well as why they call it the "Grand Line!"

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I understand because all of my navigation skills have failed to work!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Uhh... are we gonna be fine?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We'll be fine!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: things will work out one way or the other.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: and as a proof of that,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Look...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The first leg of our journey,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: is over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's an island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I see giant cacti!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So this is whiskey peak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thank God we've arrived alive!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now then, we ask you please drop us off here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: tatan!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Thank you for taking us here, my honeys!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If fate wills it, then let us meet again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bye bye baby!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Trump!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huh?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a dangerous celebration. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
